overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a suit and hat walking through a rainy 19th-century dockyard. The character moves from a covered walkway through the Port of Saint Denis, past industrial cargo areas with cotton bales and warehouses, ending at the waterfront with a steamboat visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway with patriotic bunting

events.description: exits covered walkway into open dock area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered wooden walkway toward the port exit

entered.detail: wooden roof structure with exposed beams covering the walkway
white painted wooden pillars supporting the roof structure
patriotic fabric banners strung along the left railing
two-story brick building with arched windows and signage reading PORT OF SAINT DENIS
empty wooden park benches lined along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered wooden walkway decorated with red, white, and blue bunting. The covered roof structure dominates the view ahead until the character exits into the open dock area around the 6-second mark, revealing the Port of Saint Denis building in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock plaza with port authority building

agents.ego_description: walking past the Port of Saint Denis building and American flagpole

entered.detail: American flag flying on tall flagpole
stacks of white-wrapped cotton bales visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open dock plaza, the character passes the two-story Port of Saint Denis building on the left, with an American flag flying from a pole. The area features wooden benches and the first stacks of cargo bales appear on the right as the dock opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cargo storage area between warehouses

events.description: passes close to a worker pushing a cart, briefly obstructing view

agents.ego_description: navigating between stacks of cotton bales and wooden crates along the narrow dock

notable_agents.action: worker in overalls walking past the character pushing a wooden cart

entered.detail: green wooden warehouse with COTTON CO signage
tall stacks of wooden shipping crates and pallets
industrial building with corrugated metal siding

segments.scene_description: The dock narrows between industrial warehouses and tall stacks of cotton bales wrapped in white. The character passes a worker in overalls walking in the opposite direction around the 42-second mark, navigating through the industrial cargo storage zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront edge with rope warehouse and steamboat dock

events.description: approaching waterfront edge with water and steamboat becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge past the Rope and Cord warehouse

entered.detail: blue wooden warehouse with white trim and ROPE AND CORD signage
large paddlewheel steamboat with twin smokestacks docked at the pier
wooden posts lining the edge of the dock along the water
murky harbor water visible between the dock planks and pilings

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the waterfront edge, passing the blue Rope and Cord warehouse. A large steamboat with twin smokestacks becomes visible docked at the pier on the left, with wooden pilings lining the water's edge as the dock extends toward the harbor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered corridor into the expansive, open-air industrial plaza of a rainy dockyard. It begins beneath a covered wooden walkway adorned with red, white, and blue bunting, where the roof structure frames the forward view. As the character exits the shelter, the scene opens up to reveal the Port of Saint Denis building standing in the distance. The camera then glides through the open plaza, passing the two-story port building and a flying American flag on the left before the landscape expands further to reveal wooden benches and the first stacks of cargo bales on the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cramped industrial cargo zone that gradually opens up to a wide waterfront vista. It begins as the path narrows between towering warehouses and tall stacks of white-wrapped cotton bales, where the character passes a worker in overalls. As the camera navigates through this dense storage area, the surroundings begin to expand and the industrial clutter gives way to the edge of the harbor. The scene then shifts past the blue Rope and Cord warehouse, revealing a large steamboat with twin smokestacks docked at the pier. Finally, the view opens fully across the water's edge, following the line of wooden pilings as the dock extends toward the harbor.
